definition.name: near_fixed_algebra
definition.definition: A=Im P is the near-fixed algebra: the range of the spectral idempotent P=theta(2Phi-1) of an almost-idempotent positive unital Phi, a real subspace of B(H)_sa containing 1, equipped with the projected Jordan product a•b:=P(a∘b). The order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa; only • is approximate. (def-near-fixed-algebra)
